use_cases: Display user roles or permissions in a badge format
Show notification counts or status indicators
Indicate product categories or tags in e-commerce
Mark feature availability or loading states
Display success, warning, or error states in forms
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with multiple variants for displaying status indicators, labels, and notifications. Supports primary, secondary, success, warning, info, outline, and destructive visual states with light, outline, and ghost appearance options. Features configurable sizes and disabled states with proper accessibility focus rings.
